purpose: Authorize a tiny manual public-source audit for biotech/PDUFA catalyst point-in-time admissibility.

allowed_actions: manual browser/search inspection of public pages

decision_rule.pass: At least one public/freemium source proves pre-event timestamping, negative-event retention, delisted/acquired retention, stable identifiers, and reproducible access.
decision_rule.partial: Sources can support qualitative discovery or event verification but cannot create a promotable Catalyst panel.
decision_rule.fail: No source proves point-in-time completeness and retention under the manual audit.
